ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: Hazelnut cream 50% [sugar, vegetable (palm) oil, whole milk powder, skimmed milk powder, hazelnut puree, cocoa powder, emulsifier (soy lecithin), artificial flavorings (vanillin, hazelnut)]. milk chocolate 43% [sugar, cocoa butter, chocolate liquor, whole milk powder, skimmed milk powder, emulsifier (soy lecithin), artificial flavouring (vanillin)]. hazelnut 7%.
product_name: Truffino, Milk Truffle Chocolate With Hazelnut
